958 CHMTHRPY_OTHR_ADMSN_CD CHMTHRPY_OTHR_ADMSN_CD O0110A10A Treatment: Chemo - Other (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received an other form of chemotherapy days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
